Structure your pipeline into parallel CI jobs (lint, test) and sequential CD jobs (deploy). Use the 'needs' keyword to define dependencies between jobs.
Cache dependencies using the built-in cache option in setup-node/setup-python actions. Pass build artifacts between jobs using actions/upload-artifact and actions/download-artifact.
Use GitHub Environments for deployment protection. The 'environment' key in a job enables approval rules configured in repository settings.

Add concurrency control with 'concurrency: group: workflow-ref, cancel-in-progress: true' to prevent simultaneous deployments. Use OIDC (role-to-assume) instead of static access keys for cloud authentication.
